OpenOcean Products
We proudly provide cutting edge protocols for everyone to use with the hopes of providing the most dynamic trading platform in DeFi
DEX Aggregator
We aggregate the most liquidity sources acrossthe widest selection of blockchains in DeFi, empowering our users to swap with the best possible market efficiency
Launch dApp
API v3 & SDK
OpenOcean’s advanced v3 Smart-API enables individuals and protocols to leverage the deepest liquidity across all major blockchains.  The OpenOcean v3 API powers bridges, wallets, DEXes, smart routing and more!
Trusted by MetaMask and Rabby Wallet!
Learn More
Gasless Limit Orders
OpenOceans gas-free limit orders allow for the ultimate flexibility when trading in DeFi.   with greater flexibility and efficiency.
Learn More
Cross-chain Swaps
OpenOcean’s cross-chain swaps allow the seamless transfer and swapping of assets across multiple chains by utilizing the OpenOcean aggregation protocol.
Learn More
Dollar Cost Averaging (DCA)
Automate your investments with DCA for optimal returns and reduced volatility.
Learn More
ETH Liquid Staking Aggregator
Make the most of your liquid staking assets, maximize returns and analyse all potential and possible earn routes with the OpenOcean LST aggregator.
Learn More
OpenOcean Ecosystem
We're working together with market makers, decentralized exchanges, wallets and bridges, to build a unified decentralized financial ecosystem open to everyone in Web 3.0.

OpenOcean is the leading DEX aggregator, integrating 1000+ liquidity sources across 30+ blockchains into one seamless trading interface, to bring users the best swap returns on their DeFi trading.
